consent.health_help: I explicitly consent to the processing of my health and biometric data (HR, power, location) so Coach Watts can generate personalized AI coaching.
consent.subtitle: You're just a few clicks away from AI-powered coaching insights. Let's get your account set up for success.
consent.title: Welcome to the Future of Training
consent.validation_hint: Both required consent checkboxes must be selected before you can continue.

fitbit_description: Pull nutrition history and daily food logs.
intervals_description: Required for your athlete profile, power data, and training calendar. This is the core of your AI coach.
step_import_data_desc: Coach Watts is importing your recent history
strava_description: Import activities, segments, and social training data.
wahoo_description: Sync workouts and plans with your ELEMNT device.
welcome_description: Your AI-powered endurance coach is ready. Connect your training apps to get personalized insights, recovery analysis, and daily recommendations.
whoop_description: Sync recovery scores, sleep performance, and HRV trends.
yazio_description: Track nutrition, macros, and hydration for better fueling.
google_signup_desc: You signed up with Google. Choose where your workouts and recovery data live so Coach Watts can personalize your coaching.
import_hero_desc: Your account is connected. Coach Watts is pulling in your recent history and preparing your first insights.
fallback_desc: Upload a FIT file manually or finish setup later and come back when you are ready.
setup_progress_connect_desc: Connect a training app to unlock personalized coaching.
setup_progress_connected_desc: Coach Watts is preparing your imported training history.
setup_progress_importing_desc: You can leave this page. We will keep importing in the background.
setup_progress_failed_desc: We could not finish importing your data. Retry sync or connect another source.
setup_progress_empty_desc: Try another provider or upload a FIT file to get started.
setup_progress_analysis_desc: Your data is in. Coach Watts is building your first coaching insights.
setup_progress_insight_ready_desc: Review your personalized coaching insight to finish setup.
setup_progress_data_summary: Found {workouts} workouts and {wellness} wellness records so far.
